ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project on the crowdfunding platform */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or project owner */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Total amount pledged to the project */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed, canceled) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project */,
  "launched_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was launched */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project deadline is */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the project is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Whether the project is spotlighted */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the project belongs to */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the project */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner who created the project */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., technology, film & video) */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category (e.g., web, shorts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update belongs to */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., project update, comment, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the backer supports */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward chosen by the backer */,
  "backed_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the backer supported the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the owner manages */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_owners_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff pick */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is a staff pick */,
  "pick_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was picked */,
  "pick_reason" TEXT /* Reason for picking the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_picks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spotlights" (
  "spotlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spotlight */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is spotlighted */,
  "spotlight_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was spotlighted */,
  "spotlight_reason" TEXT /* Reason for spotlighting the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spotlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spotlights_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project owner, backer, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_price" INTEGER /* Price of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., team lead, developer, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES project_teams ("team_id")
)
